contextTokens.description: estimated tokens the assembled context + history occupy (chars/4)

maxTokens.description: the max output tokens this invoke ran under

turnsRemaining.description: estimated useful turns left at this context rate before the window fills

truncated.description: true ⇒ attached context was capped/dropped to fit — see note

note.description: one-line honest disclosure of the budget/truncation, safe to surface
